mapper.select: select onboarding_id, company_id, employee_id, onboarding_template_id, status, start_date, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, progress_percent, request_no, manager_user_id, it_staff_user_id from onboarding_instances where status = 'ACTIVE' and start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}

select onboarding_id, company_id, employee_id, onboarding_template_id, status, start_date, completed_at, completed_by, created_by, created_at, updated_at, updated_by, progress_percent, request_no, manager_user_id, it_staff_user_id from onboarding_instances where company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and onboarding_template_id = #{templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(status) = upper(#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
